title: Vasudha
subTitle: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house.

title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan
subTitle: After her husband abandons her for not giving birth to a son, a resilient Ganga Mai dedicates herself to raising her three daughters with unwavering strength, grace, and affection.

title: Tum Se Tum Tak
subTitle: Simran faces Pushpa's anger for supporting Anu and Aryavardhan's affair. Meera shifts the blame and incites Gopal further, leaving Gayatri, Jhende and Aryavardhan worried by his harsh behaviour.
